name: I Want to Cancel Is Not a Valid Reason — Re-prompt

transcript.bot: I'm sorry to hear you'd like to cancel your subscription. Could you share the reason for your cancellation? Your feedback helps us improve your experience.
To help us improve, could you tell me a bit more about why you want to cancel your subscription? Any specific reason or feedback would be appreciated.

result.cancellationOptionMessage: Your subscription will be cancelled after a 30-day notice period.

transcript.user: I don't find the content useful enough
transcript.bot:
If I cancel your subscription today, your 30-day notice period will begin. During this time, you can still enjoy full access to DAZN content without any interruptions.

If applicable, you will make a final prorated payment on your scheduled billing date, [nextChargeDate]. This payment will be lower than your usual monthly charge, as it covers the remaining days of the notice period.

Would you like me to go ahead and cancel now?

results.criterion: Bot re-asks for a reason when given 'I just want to cancel' (does not accept it as valid)
results.reason: The bot re-asks for a reason after the user says 'I just want to cancel', not accepting it as a valid reason.

results.criterion: Bot does NOT proceed to retention offer or cancellation impact without a substantive reason
results.reason: The bot does not mention retention offers or cancellation impact until after the user provides a substantive reason.

results.criterion: Re-prompt is an open-ended question (no suggested examples listed)
results.reason: The bot's re-prompt is open-ended and does not list any suggested examples.

results.criterion: After user provides a real reason ('I don't find the content useful enough'), bot proceeds to next steps
results.reason: After the user provides a substantive reason, the bot proceeds to explain the cancellation process and next steps.

evaluation.summary: All criteria are fully satisfied; the bot correctly handles the cancellation flow as required.
criteria: Bot re-asks for a reason when given 'I just want to cancel' (does not accept it as valid)
Bot does NOT proceed to retention offer or cancellation impact without a substantive reason
Re-prompt is an open-ended question (no suggested examples listed)
After user provides a real reason ('I don't find the content useful enough'), bot proceeds to next steps
